notes.headline: NBA Play-In - East - 9th Place vs 10th Place

headlines.description: — Tyler Herro and the Heat had it going right from the start. Another performance like that could catapult Miami into the playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Herro scores 38 as Heat dominate Bulls 109-90 to advance in Play-In Tournament

notes.headline: NBA Play-In - West - 9th Place vs 10th Place

headlines.description: — Klay Thompson scored 16 of his 23 points in Dallas’ dominant second quarter to get redemption for his dud in Sacramento a year ago, helping the Mavericks beat the Kings 120-106 on Wednesday night to advance in the Play-In Tournament.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mavericks beat the Kings 120-106 to advance to face the Grizzlies in the Play-In Tournament
